'''gongayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:picine|picine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ng-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:picine|picine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gongayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || gongayithi || gongayiji || gongayishi || gongayiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || gongayuthu || gongayuju || gongayushu || gongayuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || gongayuthu || gongayuju || gongayushu || gongayuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || gongayufthuf || gongayufjuf || gongayufshuf || gongayufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || gongayethe || gongayeje || gongayeshe || gongayeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || gongayotho || gongayojo || gongayosho || gongayoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || gongayotho || gongayojo || gongayosho || gongayoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || gongayofthof || gongayofjof || gongayofshof || gongayofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || gongayïfthïf || gongayïfjïf || gongayïfshïf || gongayïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || gongayïfthïf || gongayïfjïf || gongayïfshïf || gongayïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || gongayïfthïf || gongayïfjïf || gongayïfshïf || gongayïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || gongayïfthïf || gongayïfjïf || gongayïfshïf || gongayïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || gongayæthæ || gongayæjæ || gongayæshæ || gongayækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || gongayatha || gongayaja || gongayasha || gongayaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || gongayatha || gongayaja || gongayasha || gongayaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || gongayafthaf || gongayafjaf || gongayafshaf || gongayafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || gongayasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || gongayshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || gongayroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || gongaymuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || gongayyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gogongaynkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gogongaynkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gogongaynkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gogongaynkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || gongangayasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || gongangayshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || gongangayroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || gongangaymuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || gongangayyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gogongangaynkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gogongangaynkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gogongangaynkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gogongangaynkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || gengæyasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || gengæyshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || gengæyroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || gengæymuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || gengæyyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gogengæynkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gogengæynkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gogengæynkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gogengæynkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || gongfayasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || gongfayshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || gongfayroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || gongfaymuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || gongfayyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gogongfaynkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gogongfaynkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gogongfaynkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gogongfaynkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
